author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(hooks): implement InfiniteHits component (algolia/react-instantsearch#3366)
body:
* feat(hooks): implement InfiniteHits component

FX-1155

* test: make createSearchClient require arguments

This way the type is automatically inferred, and as it's just a test util, requiring argument is not such a big deal

* Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: Sarah Dayan <5370675+sarahdayan@users.noreply.github.com>

* welp
